## Summary

"Adds a 'funding_stage' dimension to the scoring rubric so evals account for startup stage risk.
Motivated by issue #42 — multiple users reported grades felt too generous for pre-seed roles." -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Test / CI / tooling only
- [ ] Refactor (no user-visible change)

## Test Coverage

- [ ] Existing tests pass (`DOSSIER_VAULT="$(pwd)" pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior (if applicable)
- [ ] Manually verified the relevant mode(s) still produce reasonable output (if skill logic changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior or interface changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under the `[Unreleased]` section (if user-visible)
- [ ] No breaking changes, or the summary above documents the migration
- [ ] No PII or credentials included — `pii-scan` CI check passes
